lines.speaker: Father Jean
lines.text: Sorry, there will be no sermon today, but you may offer a prayer to Saradomin yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do the people here mostly worship Saradomin?

lines.speaker: Father Jean
lines.text: Of course! Even before our forefathers founded Kourend, under King Rada I, they remembered the tumult of the times when the armies of the gods laid waste to the lands.

lines.speaker: Father Jean
lines.text: We thank Saradomin for the end of that violent Age, and pray that he will continue to defend us from the evil other gods.
